items.headline: BlackRock (BLK) Launches Bitcoin Income ETF To Expand Its Digital Assets Suite
items.summary: BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) has launched the iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF (ticker: BITA), adding a new product to its digital assets line up. The ETF is designed to provide income from bitcoin exposure, using a structure that differs from traditional bitcoin products. This move expands BlackRock's presence in digital asset ETFs at a time when more mainstream financial products linked to crypto are reaching the market.
